001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
004import java.time.LocalDate;
005
006/**
007 * Simple value object that describes the next incubation milestone.
008 *
009 * <p>Each instance contains a human-readable label and an optional date.
010 */
011public class NextMilestoneSummary {
012
013  private final String label;
014  private final LocalDate date;
015
016  /**
017   * Creates a new milestone summary.
018   *
019   * @param label human-readable milestone label.
020   * @param date milestone date, or {@code null} if unavailable.
021   */
022  public NextMilestoneSummary(String label, @Nullable LocalDate date) {
023    this.label = label;
024    this.date = date;
025  }
026
027  /**
028   * Returns the milestone label.
029   *
030   * @return milestone label.
031   */
032  public String getLabel() {
033    return label;
034  }
035
036  /**
037   * Returns the milestone date.
038   *
039   * @return milestone date, or {@code null} if unavailable.
040   */
041  public LocalDate getDate() {
042    return date;
043  }
044}
